verses.text: Sanggamte aw, i mipihte in hotkhiatna a ngahna ding deihsakin lungsim takpi tawh Pasian kiangah thu ka ngetsak hi
Amaute in Pasian a kin mahmah lamtak uh thei-in teci-in ka pang ngam hi. Ahi zongin amaute in a man lampi tawh kin khalo uh hi
Amaute in Pasian tawh kipawl theihna ding lampi man theiloin amau theihtawmna tawh hanciam kha uh ahih manin amah tawh kipawl theihna dingin lampi a khun' zui khalo uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh upna a nei mi khempeuh Pasian tawh a kipawl theihna dingin Khrih in Thukham a beisak hi
Moses in a laigelhna sungah, “Thukham deihna bangin a gamtazo mi khempeuh a nungta ding hi,” ci-in Thukham zuihna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theihna ding thu a na gen hi

Ahi zongin upna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theihna thu a kigenna-ah, “Vantungah kua va paito ding a,” ci kei un la, “Leinuai-ah kua va paisuk ding ahi hiam?” zong ci kei un, ci hi. Tua a cihna pen vantung panin Khrih a lasuk ding leh sihna panin a thosak ding cihna ahi hi
Tua bang a cih ciangin, “Pasian' thu pen nai mahmahin note kam sung leh na lungsim sung uhah om hi,” a cihnopna ahi hi. Tua Pasian' thu pen kote' hilhhilh, “Pasian um un,” cihna thu ahi hi
Jesuh pen Topa hi, ci-in mite kiangah genin, Pasian in sihna panin amah hingkiksak zo hi, ci-in na lungsim sung uhah na up taktak uh leh hotkhiatna na ngah ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh i lungsimah i up taktakna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theihna kingah a, i kamin i genna hangin hotkhiatna a kingah ahi hi
Lai Siangtho in, “Amah a um mi peuhmah tavailo ding hi,” ci hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Jew mi leh Gentail mi a kideidanna omlo ahih manin Topa pen mi khempeuh' Topa hi kim a, ama kiangah a ngen khempeuh tungah thupha tampi tak a pia hi
Lai Siangtho in zong, “Topa tungah huhna a ngen khempeuhte in hotkhiatna a ngah ding uh hi,” ci hi
Ahi zongin a uplohpa uh tungah kua in thu ngen thei ding ahi hiam? Ama thu za ngei kei leh kua in a thu um thei ding ahi hiam? Ama thu kigen kei leh kua in za thei ding ahi hiam
A gen dingin kisawl kei leh kua in a thu gen thei ding ahi hiam? Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah, “Lungdamna thu a hilh dingin a hong pai mite hangin kinuam mahmah hi,” ci-in kigelh hi
Ahi zongin Isaiah in, “Topa aw, ka thugente uh kua in um ahi hiam?” a cih mah bangin Lungdamna Thu a za mi khempeuh in um kimlo uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin zakna panin upna hong piangthei a, Khrih thu upna ding pen hilhna panin hong piangthei pan hi

Tua ahih leh amaute in thu zalo uh ahi hiam? Lai Siangtho sungah, “Amau' awgingte leitung khempeuhah kizel a, a thugente uh in mun khempeuh a ban hi,” ci-in a kigelh mah bangin amaute in thu za khinzo uh hi

Tua ahih leh Israel mite in a thei uh hiam? Moses mahmah in Pasian' min tawh thu na gen a, “Keima mi pawl a hilote thupha pia-in, note' hazat dingin ka bawl ding a, tua mihaite' hangin note na hehna dingun ka hong bawl ding hi,” a cih mah bangin Israel mite in a thu a theilo uh hilo hi
Tua banah Isaiah in Pasian' min tawh hangtakin thu na gen a, “Kei hong zonglo mite in kei hong mu uh a, kei hong kanlo mite tungah ka kilak hi,” ci-in na gen hi
Tua ciangin Israel mite tawh kisai-in, “Ka thu a manglo, kei hong langpang mite tawh ka kilemkik theihna dingin a tawntungin ka hanciam hi,” ci-in a na gen hi.
